form.formComment: Last start 9th of 14 at Oakbank 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1400m, slow going 8 len behind Boolcunda Dawn carrying 55kg at $7. The start before that second last of 12 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 28 over 1250m, slow going 5.5 len behind Ramasis with 57kg at $91. Rates highly and is among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely hampered on jumping away and tightened.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign third of 8 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw November 4 over 1800m, soft track; 4 len behind Youbeeforty with 56.5kg at $1.55. On debut sixth of 11 at Morphettville 3yo Mdn-Sw August 30 over 1050m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Intellectual carrying 57.5kg at $18. Expected to feature.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Resuming. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Inclined to shift about under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Gelding by Pariah making his first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Oakbank on March 5 over 1050m. Cannot be underestimated.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Pariah making his first appearance. Was runner-up in a trial at Oakbank on March 5 over 1050m. Cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 5th of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Outer Banks carrying 58kg at $5. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 12 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw December 6 over 1250m, 5 len behind Light The Night with 54.5kg at $41. On debut fifth of 11 at Bordertown 3yo+ Mdn-Sw September 12 over 1100m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Call Me Eddy with 52.5kg at $21. Expecting a bright return.

On debut fifth of 11 at Bordertown 3yo+ Mdn-Sw September 12 over 1100m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Call Me Eddy with 52.5kg at $21. Expecting a bright return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out rounding the home turn.
Jumped away awkwardly and shifted in onto Kindly.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start second last of 8 at Clare 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on November 23 over 1100m, 14 len behind Dora Aurora with 54.5kg at $4.80. Went for a spell before returning 10th of 12 at Balaklava 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Leliyn with 55kg at $41. Not keen on her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Second-up. First start second last of 8 at Clare 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on November 23 over 1100m, 14 len behind Dora Aurora with 54.5kg at $4.80. Went for a spell before returning 10th of 12 at Balaklava 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 1 over 1200m, 4 len behind Leliyn with 55kg at $41. Not keen on her chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped away awkwardly, shifted in and bumped Hood Rat.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 10 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Tiptop Tori with 55kg at $71. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Halidon 3yo+ F&M Mdn-Sw on October 19 over 1200m, 3 len behind Bending Away with 55.5kg at $1.85. Will come on from that run and is well-placed to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 10 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Tiptop Tori with 55kg at $71. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Halidon 3yo+ F&M Mdn-Sw on October 19 over 1200m, 3 len behind Bending Away with 55.5kg at $1.85. Will come on from that run and is well-placed to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped away awkwardly and shifted in.
Laid out over the concluding 200m of the event.
Held up from near the 500m and was untested to the finish.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old filly by Invader out of Legal Mistress purchased for AUD $ 12,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Adelaide Yearling Sale). At the most recent trial finished fifth on April 2 at Morphettville Parks over 800m. Fitter for recent trials but looks safely held.

form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old filly by Alpine Eagle out of Red Sraad. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1000m at Strathalbyn March 26. Prefer to see her in a race before backing.

form.formComment: At debut, 6th of 12 at this track 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1000m, 3 len behind Carpe Astra carrying 53kg at $19. Expected to do far better this time. Will be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Ole Kirk out of Diamondesque. Purchased for AUD $ 8,500 (Inglis 2025 NOVEMBER (Late) Online Sale). Was second in a Strathalbyn barrier trial over 1000m March 26. Cannot be underestimated.
